## Test Cases

### TC-ATV-001: Verify Activity Management - Manual Creation of Emails and Phone calls — AC-1 (positive)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-ATV-001 |
| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |
| **Area Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\f719-activity-management-manual-creation-of-emails-and-phone-call\ATV |
| **Iteration Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\Discovery |
| **Priority** | 1 |
| **Assigned To** | QA Engineer |
| **State** | Design |
| **Automation** | Manual |
| **Test Type** | Functional |
| **Mapped FR** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **User Story** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **Mapped AC** | AC-1 |

**Preconditions:**
- Synced master-data (Account / Contact / FL / Customer Asset, where applicable) is present in D365
- User has the security role required by §9.1 of the FDD

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Navigate to the relevant entity / form for ALM Feature 719 | The form / view loads per §10.1 of the FDD |
| 2 | Setup precondition: Given A customer calls requesting a service | Precondition state is established |
| 3 | Perform action: When a D365 user enters the information in D365 | System processes the action without error |
| 4 | Observe outcome | Then only relevant fields are available for data entry |

**Post-conditions:**
- Outcome described in 'Then' is visible to the user.
- Audit log captures the change (where audit is enabled per §9.4).

**Test Data:**
- Synced records present in D365 (precondition).
- User account assigned to the role under test.

**Notes:**
Maps to ALM AC-1 preserved verbatim from the spec. FR-NNN deferred to /plan; ALM ID set by /alm sync.

### TC-ATV-002: Verify edit blocked on Fusion-sourced fields — AC-1 (negative)

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-ATV-002 |
| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |
| **Area Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\f719-activity-management-manual-creation-of-emails-and-phone-call\ATV |
| **Iteration Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\Discovery |
| **Priority** | 1 |
| **Assigned To** | QA Engineer |
| **State** | Design |
| **Automation** | Manual |
| **Test Type** | Negative |
| **Mapped FR** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **User Story** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **Mapped AC** | AC-1 |

**Preconditions:**
- Synced master-data is present in D365
- User has a non-admin role that grants Read but not Update on the synced entity

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Open a synced record (e.g., an Account or Contact) | Record opens; Fusion-sourced fields show as read-only |
| 2 | Attempt to edit a Fusion-sourced field | Edit is blocked at form level |
| 3 | Attempt to save anyway | Save is blocked with localized validation message (per VAL-001 / FDD §6.1.4) |

**Post-conditions:**
- Record remains unchanged.
- Validation message displayed to user in their UI language.

**Test Data:**
- Synced record with at least one Fusion-sourced field that is governed.

**Notes:**
Constitution §15: validation message must be loaded from per-culture RESX, not hardcoded. Per multi-language-ready posture this is a /review BLOCKER on generated code.

### TC-ATV-003: Verify upstream Fusion sync produces records consumed by this feature

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **TC ID** | TC-ATV-003 |
| **ALM ID** | *(pending — set by /alm sync)* |
| **Area Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\f719-activity-management-manual-creation-of-emails-and-phone-call\ATV |
| **Iteration Path** | IS - D365 Avanade\Discovery |
| **Priority** | 1 |
| **Assigned To** | QA Engineer |
| **State** | Design |
| **Automation** | Manual |
| **Test Type** | Integration |
| **Mapped FR** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **User Story** | *(pending — run /plan first)* |
| **Mapped AC** | Integration |

**Preconditions:**
- Upstream Fusion → D365 sync (Features 463 / 464 / 546 / 575) is operating in the test environment.
- Test environment is the same solution version as UAT.

**Test Steps:**
| # | Action | Expected Result |
|---|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Verify recent sync run completed successfully (see ADF pipeline run history) | Sync run state is Succeeded |
| 2 | Open D365 and locate a record known to have changed in Fusion since the last sync | Record reflects the latest Fusion state in D365 |
| 3 | Exercise the feature against the synced record | Feature behaves per AC; no impact from upstream sync timing |

**Post-conditions:**
- Feature outcome is consistent with synced data.

**Test Data:**
- Test record(s) modified in Fusion within the last sync window.

**Notes:**
Integration owned by data-migration agent (separate scope). This test verifies graceful interaction with synced data.
